task_description: Complete Phases 30-42 of the Quant Ecosystem: Developer Platform enhancement, QuantPay (payments), QuantOS (OS layer), QuantCloud (IaaS), QuantMaps (navigation), QuantHealth (health), QuantLearn (education), QuantWork (enterprise), Advanced AI (AGI features), QuantVerse (metaverse), Edge Computing, Governance, and Integration/Polish.
